Html:
I think I got the reference to the Ajax contorl toolkit to work, but now I get another error in my build I just cannot figure out. I sure would like to use this app if someone can help me get it working. It builds without any errors but when I try to run it, this is what I get:

thank you in advance
rcla396

System.Exception was unhandled by user code

            at System.Data.Objects.ObjectContext.CreateObjectSet[TEntity](String entitySetName)
            at TailspinSpyworks.Data_Access.CommerceEntities.get_OrderDetails() in C:\Users\DataSeek\Documents\Visual Studio 2010\Projects\Websites\BizDevTrainingVideos\BizDevTrainingVideos\Data_Access\EDM_Commerce.Designer.cs:line 101

Yes I can rebuild the project and I get no error but when I run debug this is the error I get. I also did a clean build as well. View the attachment for the error.

thank you

Royce Claborn

Thank you for your time.

The other thing is on the developer computer when I view it everything works fine, but when I publish it to the server nothing will work. It want even display the default page. I am sure that the server is setup right for the site. Well anyway I don't know what else to do to it.

thank you

rcla396
